name: PaymentAgent

methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc: Initialize the agent with owner and agent ID.

methods.name: execute
methods.desc:
Execute a payment from the agent to a recipient.
Enforces all rules before execution: - R01: Minimum amount check - R02: Maximum amount check - R03: Daily spending limit - R08: Balance sufficiency - R09: Reserve maintenance - R15: Hourly transaction limit - R16: Cooldown period - R18: Pause state check

methods.name: pause
methods.desc: Pause the agent - prevents execute() from working.

methods.name: resume
methods.desc: Resume the agent - allows execute() to work again.

methods.name: register_as_agent
methods.desc: Register this agent with the AgentRegistry.

methods.name: withdraw_to_owner
methods.desc: Withdraw funds back to owner (maintains 1 ALGO reserve).

methods.name: get_limits
methods.desc: Get spending limit, daily limit, and daily spent.

methods.name: get_status
methods.desc: Get agent status: is_paused, last_tx_time, tx_count_hour, daily_spent.

desc:
Autonomous Payment Agent Smart Contract

    Rules enforced:
    - R01: Min amount 0.001 ALGO (1000 microAlgos)
    - R02: Max amount 10 ALGO (10,000,000 microAlgos)
    - R03: Daily limit 50 ALGO (50,000,000 microAlgos)
    - R08: Balance >= amount + fee
    - R09: Reserve 1 ALGO after payment
    - R15: Max 5 transactions per hour
    - R16: 30 second cooldown between transactions
    - R18: Contract must not be paused

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Payment must be to this contract
